summary: Admin User Management UI fixes verified. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The 3 reported issues are now fixed: (1) Invite User button works and opens modal, (2) Role badges are clickable and open role-change dropdown, (3) Users list displays correctly with 36+ users.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminConsole.js line 646-651: Invite User button correctly has onClick={() => setShowInvite(true)} and data-testid='invite-user-btn'
AdminConsole.js line 656-710: Invite modal has all required fields with data-testid attributes (invite-email, invite-name, invite-role, invite-password, invite-submit)
AdminConsole.js line 769-789: Role badges are clickable with onClick={() => setEditingRole(user.id)} and have data-testid='role-badge-{userId}'
AdminConsole.js line 803-810: Edit button has onClick={() => setEditingRole(user.id)} and data-testid='edit-btn-{userId}'
AdminConsole.js line 610-628: handleRoleChange() correctly calls PUT /api/admin/users/{userId} with new role
AdminConsole.js line 584-608: handleInvite() correctly calls POST /api/admin/users and shows temp password in toast
admin_routes.py lines 1098-1135: GET /api/admin/users returns correct structure with items, total, roles
admin_routes.py lines 1137-1180: POST /api/admin/users creates user and returns id + temporary_password
admin_routes.py lines 1182-1211: PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id} updates role successfully
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed users during testing for CRUD verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin User Management fully tested. All 3 reported issues are fixed: (1) Invite User button opens modal with email, name, role, password fields. (2) Role badges are clickable and open inline dropdown for role change. (3) Edit button (pencil icon) also opens role dropdown. (4) Users list displays 36+ users with name, email, role, status columns. (5) Lock/Unlock and Reset Password buttons work correctly. (6) Search and role filter work correctly. (7) Member option is present in role filter dropdown.

users_list_displays.details: GET /api/admin/users returns users list with items, total, roles. UI displays 36+ users with name, email, role, status, created date

invite_button_works.details: Invite User button has onClick handler, opens modal with data-testid='invite-modal'

invite_modal_fields.details: Modal has email (required), name, role dropdown, password fields with proper data-testid attributes

invite_form_submission.details: POST /api/admin/users creates user, returns id + temporary_password, shows toast with temp password

role_badge_clickable.details: Role badges have onClick handler, clicking opens inline select dropdown with data-testid='role-select-{userId}'

role_change_persists.details: Selecting new role calls PUT /api/admin/users/{id}, shows 'Role updated to {role}' toast, change persists after refresh

edit_button_works.details: Edit button (pencil icon) has onClick handler, opens same role dropdown as badge click

lock_unlock_works.details: Lock/Unlock buttons call POST /api/admin/users/{id}/lock or /unlock, show toast confirmation

reset_password_works.details: Reset Password button calls POST /api/admin/users/{id}/reset-password, shows temp password in toast

role_filter_has_member.details: Role filter dropdown includes Member option along with Admin, Instructor, Student, Adult

search_filter_works.details: Search input filters users by name or email in real-time

mocked_apis.none: All tests use live endpoints - no mocking
